# Darryl Finkton Jr.

> Open source ideas on poverty, population, and liberation. All content is released under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0).

## Books

### Have One Kid: How We Can Overcome Environmental Collapse and Capitalism Without a Violent Uprising (July 2026)

- [Book Overview](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/)
- [Chapter 1: The One Child Revolution](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/chapter-01/)
- [Chapter 2: Too Many People (Simplified)](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/chapter-02-simplified/)
- [Chapter 2.1: Too Many People (Detailed)](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/chapter-02-detailed/)
- [Chapter 3: Slaves to Growth](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/chapter-03/)
- [Chapter 4: Bankruptcy Is Better Than Starving](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/chapter-04/)
- [Chapter 5: Will The Empire Strike Back?](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/chapter-05/)
- [Full Text](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/have-one-kid/full-text/)

### The Language of Liberation: A Story and a Critique (June 2024)

- [Book Overview](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/language-of-liberation/)
- [Full Text](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/language-of-liberation/full-text/)

### End Poverty. Make Trillions. (February 2023)

- [Book Overview](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/)
- [Introduction](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/introduction/)
- [Chapter 1: This Can't Be Life](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/chapter-01/)
- [Chapter 2: You Can't Win, Child](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/chapter-02/)
- [Chapter 3: They Made Us Hate Ourselves and Love Their Wealth](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/chapter-03/)
- [Chapter 4: Far From a Harvard Student](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/chapter-04/)
- [Chapter 5: Don't Give Me That Do-Goody Good Bullshit](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/chapter-05/)
- [Chapter 6: It's a Rich Man's Game, No Matter What They Call It](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/chapter-06/)
- [Chapter 7: I Think I'll Try Defying Gravity](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/chapter-07/)
- [Chapter 8: Ism Schism](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/chapter-08/)
- [Chapter 9: The Waters Around You Have Grown](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/chapter-09/)
- [Chapter 10: Now That I'm Older, All Childish Things End](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/chapter-10/)
- [Chapter 11: The Seed Money Act](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/chapter-11/)
- [Chapter 12: Questions and Answers](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/chapter-12/)
- [Full Text](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/books/end-poverty-make-trillions/full-text/)

## Essays

- [The Consensus Trap: How AI Processes Systemic Change](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/consensus-trap/) (July 2026)
- [Loving Attention Is All You Need](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/loving-attention-is-all-you-need/) (November 2025)
- [I Dream of Village](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/i-dream-of-village/) (March 2025)
- [God, Money, & Mind](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/god-money-mind/) (March 2025)
- [It Pays To End Poverty](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/it-pays-to-end-poverty/) (April 2024)
- [UBI and the Environmental Crisis](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/ubi-and-the-environmental-crisis/) (March 2024)
- [What's the Right Amount of UBI?](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/right-amount-of-ubi/) (March 2024)
- [How Do We Pay for Universal Basic Income?](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/how-do-we-pay-for-ubi/) (February 2024)
- [Economic modeling of how to end poverty in the United States while saving taxpayers trillions of dollars](https://endpovertymaketrillions.medium.com/economic-modeling-of-how-to-end-poverty-in-the-united-states-while-saving-taxpayers-trillions-of-1679b751d0c0) (June 2022)
- [Using my Jesus year to End Poverty. Make Trillions.](https://darrylfinktonjr.com/essays/jesus-year/) (January 2022)

## Peer-Reviewed Articles

- [Socioeconomic position, health behaviors, and racial disparities in cause-specific infant mortality in Michigan, USA](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/25849882/)
- [Infant mortality among Arab-Americans](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/22706996/)
- [International standards for early fetal size and pregnancy dating](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/25044000/)
- [A rapid questionnaire assessment of environmental exposures to pregnant women](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/24028080/)
- [International estimated fetal weight standards](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/27804212/)
- [The antepartum stillbirth syndrome](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/28029221/)
- [Necrotizing Enterocolitis and Central Line Associated Blood Stream Infection](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/25841540/)
